result.stdout:
Usage:
nbeauty [--loglevel=(Error|Detail|Info)] [--srmode] [--enabledebug] [--usepatch] [--hiddens=hiddenFiles] [--noruntimeinfo] [--roll-forward=<rollForward>] [--nbloaderverpolicy=(auto|with|without)] [--apphostentry=<appHostEntry>] [--apphostdir=<appHostDir>] <beautyDir> [<libsDir> [<excludes>]]

Arguments
  <excludes>    dlls that no need to be moved, multi-dlls separated with ";". Example: dll1.dll;lib*;...

Options
  -apphostdir string
    	[.NET Core Non Single-File App Only] relative path based on beautyDir.
  -apphostentry string
    	[.NET Core Non Single-File App Only] patch apphost entry location.
  -enabledebug
    	[.NET Core App Only] allow 3rd debuggers(like dnSpy) debugs the app
  -gitcdn string
    	[.NET Core App Only] specify a HostFXRPatcher mirror repo if you have troble in connecting github.
    	RECOMMEND https://gitee.com/liesauer/HostFXRPatcher for mainland china users.
    	
  -gittree string
    	[.NET Core App Only] specify to a valid git branch or any bits commit hash(up to 40) to grab the specific artifacts and won't get updates any more.
    	default is master, means that you always use the latest artifacts.
    	NOTE: please provide as longer commit hash as you can, otherwise it may can not be determined as a valid unique commit hash.
    	
  -hiddens string
    	dlls that end users never needed, so hide them.
  -loglevel string
    	log level. valid values: Error/Detail/Info
    	Error: Log errors only.
    	Detail: Log useful infos.
    	Info: Log everything.
    	 (default "Error")
  -nbloaderverpolicy string
    	loader versioning policy, see https://github.com/nulastudio/NetBeauty2/issues/65 for more details.
    	 (default "auto")
  -noruntimeinfo
    	[.NET Core App Only] keep the runtime info in deps.json or not
  -roll-forward string
    	override default roll-forward behavior, see https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/versions/selection#control-roll-forward-behavior for more details.
  -srmode
    	[.NET Core App Only] share the runtime between apps
  -usepatch
    	[.NET Core App Only] use the patched hostfxr to reduce files

    	[.NET Core App Only] specify a HostFXRPatcher mirror repo if you have troble in connecting github.
    	RECOMMEND https://gitee.com/liesauer/HostFXRPatcher for mainland china users.
    	
  -gittree string
    	[.NET Core App Only] specify to a valid git branch or any bits commit hash(up to 40) to grab the specific artifacts and won't get updates any more.
    	default is master, means that you always use the latest artifacts.
    	NOTE: please provide as longer commit hash as you can, otherwise it may can not be determined as a valid unique commit hash.

    	dlls that end users never needed, so hide them.
  -loglevel string
    	log level. valid values: Error/Detail/Info
    	Error: Log errors only.
    	Detail: Log useful infos.
    	Info: Log everything.
    	 (default "Error")
  -nbloaderverpolicy string
    	loader versioning policy, see https://github.com/nulastudio/NetBeauty2/issues/65 for more details.
    	 (default "auto")

  -roll-forward string
    	override default roll-forward behavior, see https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/versions/selection#control-roll-forward-behavior for more details.
